# Pavement Protectors

> Pavement Protectors is a sealcoating and asphalt maintenance company in Branford, CT, serving residential and commercial properties throughout the Connecticut shoreline. Services include driveway and parking lot sealcoating, hot rubber crack filling, hot asphalt patch repair, line striping, and oil & moss removal.

## Business Details

- Name: Pavement Protectors
- Location: 164 N Main St, Branford, CT 06405
- Phone: (203) 903-3273
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Service area: East Haven, Branford, Guilford, Madison, Clinton, Westbrook, Old Saybrook, North Branford, North Haven, Hamden, New Haven, and Wallingford, CT
- Free estimates; residential and commercial work

## Pages

- [Home](https://pavement-protectors.com/): Overview of sealcoating, crack filling, and asphalt repair services across the CT shoreline.
- [Services](https://pavement-protectors.com/services.html): Detailed descriptions of sealcoating, hot rubber crack repair, hot asphalt patch repair, line striping, oil & moss removal, and commercial services.
- [Commercial Sealcoating](https://pavement-protectors.com/commercial-sealcoating.html): Commercial parking lot sealcoating and line striping for retail centers, auto dealerships, offices, HOAs, storage facilities, and restaurants, with a gallery of completed projects.
- [Photos](https://pavement-protectors.com/photos.html): Gallery of completed sealcoating, crack filling, and asphalt repair projects throughout Connecticut.
- [Promotions](https://pavement-protectors.com/promotions.html): Current offers and seasonal specials.
- [FAQs](https://pavement-protectors.com/faq.html): Common questions about sealcoating, timing, curing, and pavement maintenance.
- [Contact](https://pavement-protectors.com/contact.html): Phone, hours, location, and free-estimate request form.
- [Reviews](https://pavement-protectors.com/reviews.html): Customer reviews and the option to rate your experience.

## Services

- Sealcoating — protective coating for driveways and parking lots that guards against UV, water, oil, and freeze-thaw damage; recommended every 2–3 years.
- Hot Rubber Crack Repairs — commercial-grade hot-applied rubberized sealant that stays flexible and stops cracks from spreading.
- Hot Asphalt Patch Repair — permanent repair of potholes, edges, depressions, and utility cuts.
- Line Striping — parking lot striping, ADA-accessible stalls, fire lanes, crosswalks, arrows, and stencils.
- Oil & Moss Removal — surface cleaning and prep before sealcoating.
- Commercial Services — scheduled sealcoating programs and ongoing pavement management for businesses.

## Contact

For a free estimate, call (203) 903-3273 or use the form at https://pavement-protectors.com/contact.html.
